title: Positive flow: Selecting a city from the list
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Scroll through the list of cities and tap on 'BUENOS AIRES'. | Verify that 'BUENOS AIRES' is selected.
expected_result: 'BUENOS AIRES' is selected in the list.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to select a non-existent city
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Scroll through the list of cities and tap on a non-existent city name. | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating the city does not exist.
expected_result: An error message indicating the city does not exist is displayed.

title: Boundary validation: Selecting the first city in the list
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Tap on 'ARGENTINA' at the top of the list. | Verify that 'ARGENTINA' is selected.

title: Boundary validation: Selecting the last city in the list
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Scroll to the bottom of the list and tap on 'PERGAMINO'. | Verify that 'PERGAMINO' is selected.

title: Toggle state: Selecting the same city multiple times
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Tap on 'BUENOS AIRES'. | Verify that 'BUENOS AIRES' is selected. | Tap on 'BUENOS AIRES' again. | Verify that 'BUENOS AIRES' remains selected.

title: Usability: Navigating back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Tap on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that you are navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: You are navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Accessibility: Ensuring the back arrow is accessible
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Perform a long press on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the back arrow is accessible and can be interacted with.
expected_result: The back arrow is accessible and can be interacted with.

title: Data persistence: Selecting a city and verifying persistence
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the 'Select City' screen. | Select 'BUENOS AIRES'. | Navigate away from the 'Select City' screen. | Navigate back to the 'Select City' screen. | Verify that 'BUENOS AIRES' is still selected.
